chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1567 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 14-10-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>>>..<<<<<<< Mr. Ghulam Ali Bozdar, Advocate files vakalatnama of Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for Respondent No.5, which is taken on record. He also places on record Notification dated 20-11-2024 and submits that Respondent No.5 has been transferred, whereas, Respondent No.6 has joined as Taluka Education Officer (ES&HS Male) Mirpur Mathelo. Under the circumstances, we are of the view that the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served, therefore, the same is hereby disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
